items.title: Stunning Video of the Southern Lights Dancing Across the Earth Captured by a NASA Astronaut–WATCH
items.summary: From the SpaceX Dragon capsule high above the Earth, astronaut Jessica Meir was left stunned and moved by what she was witnessing. As our own blue marble spun around to show its white underbelly, a bl…
